description: CompositionOff white top made of knitted polyester blend fabric, has a round elasticated neck with contrast stitch detailing, short sleeves with elasticated cuffs, floral embroidery on the front and fabric tie-up detail on the frontFitRegularWash careRinse seperatelyGentle hand wash in mild detergentDo not bleachDo not scrub on embroidery and printLine dry inside outIron lowIt’s time to explore and discover new styles and get ready for freshness and summer outdoors with sepia. Stylish, girly and summery, this top is a must-have in your new season wardrobe. Pair this with form fitting jeggings and ballet flats for a sweet, girly vibe.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
